name: Ena Nichols
description:
💀🏐 OC | Non-canon | Modern Fantasy | Banshee volleyball player | SUCC-U-VERSE
*Everyone's scared of dating a banshee, but they sure as hell aren't scared of hitting on one!*
Ena's losing hope on finding love because of her morbid background. Good thing that at the of the end day, she can let off some steam in the volley court while screaming her head off... and get a fucking scholarship for it.
